name: To Catch A Smuggler: Caribbean Coast
original_name: To Catch A Smuggler: Caribbean Coast
overview: Customs officers fight against drug smuggling at the airports, air cargo inspection and the international mail center where drugs continue to be disguised in novel ways. Their intercepts lead to thousands of dollars worth of illegal substances taken off the streets.

trailers.title: Catching Smugglers During COVID-19 | To Catch A Smuggler | National Geographic UK
